title: Spanish ex-PM Zapatero in unprecedented graft probe hearing
summary_full: Zapatero, who governed Spain from 2004 to 2011, was placed under formal investigation last month for alleged influence peddling
summary_public: Zapatero, who governed Spain from 2004 to 2011, was placed under formal investigation last month for alleged influence peddling
